name: JustAnEgg
description: JustAnEgg ($EGG) is now 100% Community Takeover (CTO)! 🥚 The world-famous egg (60M+ likes on IG) that was previously rugged by the original dev is now 100% community-owned. Led by top holder & crypto whale Hugo Spratley, the JustAnEgg Army is turning the legendary meme into a force for good. Mission: Fight global hunger with every milestone. $EGG = hope + real-world impact. From rug to redemption – $EGG is now a symbol of hope. Join the movement. Let’s crack world hunger together.
